summary: Iteration 56: Leaderboard + Community v3 Offers Features - All features tested and working. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/leaderboard/clients - returns entries array with rank, user_name, score, projects_count
✅ GET /api/leaderboard/companies - returns entries array with rank, company_name, avg_rating, score
✅ POST /api/community/offers - requires company user type (403 for clients)
✅ POST /api/community/offers - creates offer with price_eur, message, timeline_days
✅ GET /api/community/public-projects - returns projects array with total and page
✅ /leaderboard - Scoring info card showing 'Как се изчисляват точките?'
✅ /leaderboard - Shows ranked companies (TestFirma LB with 3 points visible)
✅ /community - Page loads with all 6 filter tabs
✅ /community - Project posts show OffersSection with offer count
✅ /community - Offers display company name, price (2500 EUR), timeline (14 дни)
✅ Navigation - Trophy icon next to Класация link
critical_code_review_comments: Code review of Leaderboard and Community v3 features:
✅ server.py (lines 5109-5155): GET /api/leaderboard/clients aggregates from published_projects + community_posts, calculates score = projects*10 + likes*3 + posts*2
✅ server.py (lines 5158-5193): GET /api/leaderboard/companies aggregates from users + reviews + community_offers, calculates score = rating*20 + reviews*5 + offers*3 + projects*10
✅ server.py (lines 5198-5232): POST /api/community/offers validates company user type (403 for clients), creates offer with price_eur, message, timeline_days
✅ server.py (lines 5235-5241): GET /api/community/offers/{post_id} returns offers array sorted by created_at descending
✅ server.py (lines 5244-5264): GET /api/community/public-projects returns paginated published projects
✅ LeaderboardPage.jsx: Full implementation with tabs, period filter, scoring info, rank icons (Crown/Medal/Award)
✅ CommunityPage.jsx: OffersSection component (lines 213-296) shows offers on project posts, allows companies to make offers
seed_data_creation: Test users created: TestClient LB (client) and TestFirma LB (company) for testing offers flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified: 1) Leaderboard page at /leaderboard with Clients and Companies tabs, period filter (all/month), scoring info card. Client scoring: projects*10 + likes*3 + posts*2. Company scoring: rating*20 + reviews*5 + offers*3 + projects*10. 2) Community v3 Offers: POST /api/community/offers creates offers (company only), GET /api/community/offers/{post_id} returns offers. CommunityPage.jsx OffersSection shows offers on project posts with price_eur and timeline_days. 3) Public projects: GET /api/community/public-projects returns paginated published projects. 4) Navigation: 'Класация' (Leaderboard) link added to 'Още' dropdown with Trophy icon.

leaderboard_clients_endpoint.details: GET /api/leaderboard/clients returns entries with rank, user_name, score, projects_count, likes_received

leaderboard_companies_endpoint.details: GET /api/leaderboard/companies returns entries with rank, company_name, avg_rating, score

leaderboard_period_filter.details: ?period=month filters results to last 30 days for clients (companies don't filter by period)

community_offers_create.details: POST /api/community/offers - requires auth (401), requires company (403 for clients), creates offer with price_eur, message, timeline_days

community_offers_get.details: GET /api/community/offers/{post_id} returns offers array for a specific post

public_projects_endpoint.details: GET /api/community/public-projects returns projects array with total and page for pagination

leaderboard_page_ui.details: Page loads at /leaderboard with Клиенти and Фирми tabs, period filters, scoring info card

community_offers_filter.details: 'Оферти' filter tab visible in CommunityPage with data-testid='filter-offer'

community_offers_section_ui.details: OffersSection visible on project posts showing offer count, company name, price, timeline

navigation_leaderboard_link.details: 'Класация' link added to 'Още' dropdown with Trophy icon (data-testid='nav-leaderboard')
